parsed.answer: The question's premise is incorrect. Hopfield networks were first described by John Hopfield in 1982, not 1972. There was no description of 'Hopfield networks' in 1972 because the networks didn't exist until Hopfield published his work in 1982. Other recurrent neural network research existed in 1972, but these were not Hopfield networks.
